text: The environment feels clinical and modern, yet oddly disorienting, perhaps because of the angular view and the abundance of glass and reflection. As I enter the R+D space, a mixture of curiosity and anticipation arises. I sense myself becoming part of an ongoing dialogue between innovation and the unknown, surrounded by artifacts and texts that invite reflection on human interaction with intelligent systems. There’s an underlying excitement, as if I stand at a threshold where contemplation aligns with creation.
